title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates:
Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates!
